creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
The report in https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=1287932114+0+current/freebsd-pkg-fallout seems a bit different. It is a SIGSEGV in the JVM.

I use poudriere and I was able to build the port without issues. Marko, is this reproducible to you? How do you use poudriere? Is it via poudriered?
